summary: Comprehensive testing of PO Reports Management Module. Backend: 22/22 tests passed after fixing MongoDB collection boolean check bug. Frontend: All features working - Dashboard with summary stats, charts (Production Trend, Quality Trend), tab navigation (Overview, Production, Quality, Inspection, Tests, Timeline), and approval workflow.
critical_code_review_comments: PO Reports module properly implements all 5 report types: DPR (Production), DQR (Quality), Inspection, Fabric Test, Trims
Alert system correctly generates alerts for high DHU (>5%) and failed inspections
Approval workflow properly restricted to Brand role only
Analytics endpoint provides production trends, quality trends, defect breakdown, and inspection results
Timeline view shows chronological reports with color-coded type indicators
seed_data_creation: Created multiple test reports via API tests: 3 production reports, 5 quality reports (including high DHU alerts), 5 inspection reports (including failed inspections), 2 fabric test reports, 2 trims reports
context_for_next_testing_agent: PO Reports module fully functional. Test PO ID: 61bc85e4-8d3c-4d1f-a533-b7c5cfda5bee has comprehensive test data. Fixed MongoDB collection boolean check bug in approval endpoint (line 876). All CRUD operations, analytics, alerts, and approval workflow working.

po_summary.notes: GET /api/reports/po/{po_id} returns summary with counts and averages

po_analytics.notes: GET /api/reports/po/{po_id}/analytics returns production/quality trends and charts data

production_reports_crud.notes: POST/GET production reports with efficiency tracking

quality_reports_crud.notes: POST/GET quality reports with defect tracking and DHU calculation

inspection_reports_crud.notes: POST/GET inspection reports with AQL levels and pass/fail results

fabric_test_reports_crud.notes: POST/GET fabric test reports with test results

trims_reports_crud.notes: POST/GET trims reports with item testing

alerts_system.notes: Alerts auto-generated for high DHU and failed inspections

role_enforcement.notes: Manufacturer blocked from approving, Brand can view all

dashboard_summary.notes: Shows 5 stat cards (Production, Quality, Inspections, Test Reports, Pending)

kpi_cards.notes: Shows Avg Efficiency, Avg DHU (red if >5%), Inspection Pass Rate

alerts_banner.notes: Shows active alerts count with warning styling

production_trend_chart.notes: LineChart showing Target vs Actual output over time

tab_navigation.notes: All 6 tabs working (Overview, Production, Quality, Inspection, Tests, Timeline)

production_tab.notes: Shows DPR list with efficiency, status badges, Review button

quality_tab.notes: Shows DQR list with DHU, Critical defect badges, Review button

inspection_tab.notes: Shows inspection list with PASS/FAIL badges, approved/rejected counts

tests_tab.notes: Shows Fabric Test and Trims reports with pass/fail counts

timeline_tab.notes: Chronological view with color-coded dots and status badges

approval_dialog.notes: Review dialog with status dropdown, comments, Submit Review button

approval_workflow.notes: Successfully approved report, toast shown, pending count updated

bug_fixed.issue: 500 Internal Server Error when approving reports
bug_fixed.root_cause: MongoDB collection objects do not support boolean testing (if not collection:)
bug_fixed.fix: Changed 'if not collection:' to 'if collection is None:' on line 876
